title: Argon Tableware Glass Spice Jars with Airtight Metal Clip Lid - 70ml/2.5oz - 6 Pack - 4 Colour Seals - Small Kitchen Storage Container Round Preserving Jar for Spice, Seasoning
features: ✨ Rustic Farmhouse Style & Functionality – The Argon Tableware 70ml Glass Spice Jar combines timeless vintage charm with modern practicality. Perfect for herbs, spices, seasonings, or small condiments, it adds decorative appeal while keeping contents fresh.

🔒 Airtight Freshness Guaranteed – Designed with a stainless steel clip-top lid and an orange silicone seal, this jar provides a superior airtight lock that outlasts traditional rubber seals. Keeps flavours locked in and moisture out for longer-lasting freshness.

📏 Compact & Versatile Size – 70ml – Measuring 8.5cm in height, this mini round preserving jar is ideal for spice racks, kitchen cupboards, or small-batch homemade preserves. Perfect storage for spices, herbs, chilli flakes, salt, pepper, and more.

💎 Durable Glass Construction – Crafted from strong, clear glass with a sturdy metal locking mechanism, this airtight spice jar is built for everyday use in home kitchens, cafes, and restaurants. A practical, reusable, and eco-friendly storage solution.

🛒 Part of a Complete Storage Collection – Available in sizes up to 3000ml (3 Litres), the Argon Tableware range is perfect for everything from dried goods like pasta and cereals to pickles, chutneys, jams, and sauces. Mix and match for a coordinated pantry.
description: Product Description For a cool and contemporary storage solution why not try Argon Tableware’s extensive collection of Glass Storage Jars and Canisters? Serving up an array of shapes, sizes and lids, you're sure to find the perfect style to fit your kitchen décor! On Trend Designs Rolled edges creates a smooth glass effect and the variety of lids offer up a scandi appeal Airtight Seal on all Lids Keeps foods fresh for longer A Wide Array of Styles Available Find a style which fits your home and kitchen décor!
